title: PIM Activator managed configuration
description: Schema for the chrome.storage.managed configuration the PIM Activator extension reads on every popup load. Admins push values via the HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge\3rdparty\extensions\<extId>\policy registry path (or the Google\Chrome equivalent), typically via Intune ADMX-backed Configuration Profile.

tenantCatalog.title: Tenant catalog (JSON-encoded array)
tenantCatalog.description: A JSON-encoded array of tenant entries. Each entry: { name, tenantId, clientId, defaultJustification?, defaultDurationHours?, prefix?, entraPrefix?, azurePrefix?, groupNameFilter?, entraGroupRegex?, azureGroupRegex? }. The extension parses this string on every popup load and merges it with any locally-imported catalog before rendering the tenant-switcher dropdown.
